frontmatter.title: Guarded Recursive Types in Type Theory
frontmatter.meta: @phdthesis{vezzosi:2015, author = {Vezzosi, Andrea}, school = {Institutionen f\"{o}r data- och informationsteknik, Datavetenskap (Chalmers), Chalmers tekniska h\"{o}gskola}, year = {2015}, keywords = {induction,coinduction,totality,type theory,guarded types,sized types,Agda}, note = {63}, title = {Guarded Recursive Types in Type Theory}, }
